emails.subject: You're in. Here's what happens next
emails.preview_text: Plus the one thing that actually moved the needle
emails.body:
Hey,

You just joined 2,400+ solopreneurs building profitable side projects.

Quick intro: I'm building apps and content systems that generate passive income. Every week I share what's working, what failed, and the actual numbers.

No fluff. No motivational quotes. Just tactics you can use today.

Here's what to expect:
- Weekly breakdown of a revenue-generating system
- Real numbers (revenue, costs, time spent)
- Tools and templates I actually use

First up: Reply to this email with what you're building. I read every response.

Talk soon,
[Name]

emails.subject: The $3k/month system I built in a weekend
emails.body:
Quick story.

Last March I built a simple tool in 2 days. Nothing fancy. Solves one problem for one audience.

Today it makes $3,200/month on autopilot. I spend maybe 2 hours per week on it.

Here's the breakdown:

**The Build:**
- Day 1: Core functionality (8 hours)
- Day 2: Landing page + payment (6 hours)
- Total cost: $47 (domain + hosting)

**The Growth:**
- Posted in 3 relevant subreddits
- One thread got 200+ upvotes
- 40 signups in 48 hours

**Current Numbers:**
- 847 paying users at $3.99/month
- Churn: 4.2%
- Support tickets: 3-4 per week

The lesson: Small tools that solve one problem well beat complex apps every time.

Tomorrow I'll share the exact stack I used.

[Name]

emails.subject: My tech stack (copy this)
emails.preview_text: Everything I use to build and ship fast
emails.body:
People ask what tools I use. Here's the full list:

**Building:**
- Next.js (frontend + API)
- Supabase (database + auth)
- Vercel (hosting)
- Stripe (payments)

**Content:**
- Notion (planning)
- Buffer (scheduling)
- Descript (video editing)
- Canva (graphics)

**Automation:**
- Make.com (workflows)
- Zapier (simple triggers)
- n8n (complex stuff)

**Analytics:**
- Plausible (privacy-friendly)
- Posthog (product analytics)
- RevenueCat (subscription tracking)

Total monthly cost: $127

Revenue generated: $8,400/month

The expensive tools aren't worth it until you're making money. Start free, upgrade when you have revenue.

Next email: The content system that drives 80% of my traffic.

[Name]

emails.subject: How I get 50k views/month without ads
emails.body:
I create one piece of content per week.

It becomes 20+ pieces across platforms.

Here's the system:

**Monday: Record**
- 10-minute video explaining one concept
- Takes 30 minutes including setup

**Tuesday: Transform**
- Video becomes 5 short clips
- AI transcribes to blog post
- Extract 3 tweet threads

**Wednesday: Distribute**
- YouTube (long form)
- TikTok/Reels/Shorts (clips)
- Twitter (threads)
- LinkedIn (professional take)

**Thursday: Engage**
- Reply to every comment
- DM new followers
- Note what performed best

**Results:**
- 50k+ monthly views
- 200+ new email subscribers/month
- 3-5 inbound leads/week

Time spent: 4 hours/week.

One camera, one topic, one hour of recording. The rest is distribution.

[Name]

emails.subject: What to build next (based on what works)
emails.body:
You've been here a week. Time for the good stuff.

If I were starting today, I'd build one of these:

**1. Niche Timer App**
- Pick any habit (prayer, meditation, exercise)
- Add gamification (streaks, badges)
- Charge $4.99/month
- Market: Instagram + TikTok content
- Potential: $5-10k/month

**2. Faceless YouTube Channel**
- Pick: relaxation, motivation, or clips
- Use AI for voiceover
- Post 2x daily
- Revenue: Ad share + sponsorships
- Potential: $2-5k/month at 100k subs

**3. Cold Email for Local Businesses**
- Offer one service (SEO audits, social management)
- Charge $500-2000/month
- 5 clients = $5k/month
- Tools: Instantly + Apollo

All three can be built in under a week.

Pick one. Start today. Ship something by Friday.

That's the game.

[Name]

P.S. Hit reply and tell me which one you're going for. I'll share specific resources for that path.
